summary: End-to-end testing of Alex Morgan portfolio MVP. Backend: 13/13 pytest cases passed (root, categories with correct counts, case-studies list+filter+by-id+404, contact create+persist+validation, CV PDF download). Frontend: hero loads with 'Alex Morgan' + portrait + intro + CTAs, sticky nav with /api/cv link, gallery shows 6 cards with working category filters (strategic-partnerships=2, gtm-strategy=1, all=6), case-study dialog opens with content and closes, contact form validates empty/invalid email and on valid submission shows success view + toast and can return to form. CV download links present in nav/hero/contact pointing to /api/cv. No blocking issues found.

issues: Radix DialogContent emits a console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby' — minor a11y nit, consider adding DialogDescription or aria-describedby={undefined} suppress.

action_items: (Optional) Add DialogDescription/aria-describedby to CaseStudyDialog to clear Radix a11y warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py stores created_at as ISO string in Mongo but returns Pydantic ContactSubmission with datetime — consistent and clean. Good.
server.py /api/contact GET excludes _id and parses created_at back to datetime — correct ObjectId handling.
Pydantic v2 EmailStr + Field constraints provide proper 422 validation for name(min 2), message(min 10), email format.
CORS uses env CORS_ORIGINS with default '*' — acceptable for portfolio.
Frontend uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL via api.js — no hardcoded URLs.
All required data-testid attributes are present and reachable (hero, nav, gallery, filters, case cards, dialog, contact form/inputs/submit/success/send-another/cv links).
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app.
seed_data_creation: Created one MongoDB contact_submission via pytest (name=TEST Reviewer) and one via UI (name=Test User, email=browsertest@example.com). Both persisted in contact_submissions collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_portfolio_api.py covers all current endpoints; reuse + extend. App is a single page at '/'. All filter chips and case cards use data-testid filter-{category-id} and case-card-{case-id}. Public URL: https://github-builder-24.preview.emergentagent.com.
